text: Surrounded by gleaming glass walls and screens displaying cryptic symbols, I feel a mix of curiosity and estrangement. The modern, ordered space seems to promise clarity and innovation, yet the tilted angles invoke an underlying uncertainty. As a philosopher, I am drawn to interpret the meanings behind R+D: progress, research, the relentless pursuit of knowledge. It fills me with a sense of anticipation and a desire to question what lies behind the surface of apparent progress.
